channel.title: Qutaifan Software Reviews
channel.description: Independent reviews of free, open-source, and real-free-tier software.

item.title: Best Free Graphic Design Tools 2026: 8 Honest Picks
item.description: Compare eight verified free graphic design tools for photos, vectors, painting, UI, RAW files, and print, with honest limits and official links.

item.title: Best Free Video Editing Software 2026: 8 Picks
item.description: Compare eight verified free video editors for professional color, YouTube timelines, quick cuts, and Linux workflows.

item.title: Free Alternative to Photoshop 2026: 7 Tested Picks (No Watermark)
item.description: The best free alternatives to Photoshop in 2026 — Photopea, GIMP, Krita and more. Full layers, masks, RAW and PSD support. No subscription, no watermark.

item.title: Best Free AI Tools 2026: 100+ Free Picks
item.description: Find the best free AI tools 2026: 100+ chatbots, image, video, code and local AI picks. Compare no-cost options and start building today.

item.title: Best Free AI Writing Tools 2026 — Tested & Compared
item.description: Compare the best free AI writing tools in 2026: ChatGPT, Claude, QuillBot, Grammarly, Hemingway Editor, and DeepL Write. Genuinely free options compared.

item.title: Best Free Games 2026: Fair No-Cost Picks
item.description: Best free games 2026: fair free-to-play, open-source, indie and browser games worth playing. No trials, no pay-to-win traps.

item.title: Best Free Password Manager 2026: Top Picks
item.description: Compare the best free password manager 2026 picks: Bitwarden, KeePassXC, Proton Pass, Google Password Manager and Apple Passwords.

item.title: Open Source Alternative to Paid Software 2026
item.description: Open source alternative to paid software: replace Office, Photoshop, Slack, Notion, Drive, Salesforce and more with free open-source tools.
